summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Defiance Space and Connective Tech ETF (UFOX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of US-listed companies involved in the rollout of connective technologies. Investments consist of 50 companies, selected and weighted based on market capitalization. UFOX was launched on Mar 4, 2019 and is issued by Defiance.
infoTable: BlueStar Space and Connective Technologies Index
